Document:
# Adding New Species
This guide covers how to create a new playable species in OpenEdge 14.
## Step 1: Create the Species Prototype
Species definitions live in [mono]Resources/Prototypes/_OE14/Species/[/mono]:
- type: speciesBase id: OE14Goblin name: species-name-goblin roundStart: true prototype: MobGoblinSpecies sprites: GoblinSprites skinColorsAllowed: false defaultSkinTone: "#6B8E23"
## Step 2: Create the Entity Prototype
- type: entity id: MobGoblinSpecies parent: BaseMobSpecies components: - type: OE14CharacterStats baseStrength: 4 baseVitality: 4 baseDexterity: 7 baseIntelligence: 5 - type: OE14SkillTree trees: - GoblinCunning - GoblinStealth
## Step 3: Add Racial Modifiers
If the species has innate stat bonuses, configure them in the CharacterStats or via skills that auto-apply at spawn.
## Step 4: Add Localization
species-name-goblin = Goblin species-description-goblin = Small, cunning creatures with high agility.
## Step 5: Test
1. Start character creation 2. Select the new species 3. Verify stats and skill trees appear correctly 4. Spawn and verify racial bonuses are applied
## Content Under Construction
Full guide with sprite setup and more examples coming soon.
